parameters.jsCode:
const sqlLiteral = (value) => {
  if (value === null || value === undefined || value === '') return 'NULL';
  return "'" + String(value).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'";
};
const request = $input.first()?.json ?? {};
const member = request.member ?? '';
const product = request.product ?? '';
const venueId = request.venue_id ?? '';
const btn = request.btn ?? '';
const requestSource = request.request_source ?? 'metabase_missing_signup';
const hasIdentifier = Boolean(venueId || btn || member);
if (!product || !hasIdentifier) {
  return [{ json: { sql: `SELECT 'Missing required identifier(s). Provide product and at least one of member, venue_id, or btn.'::text AS message, 400::int AS response_code, 'bad_request'::text AS action, NULL::bigint AS signup_id, NULL::bigint AS batch_id, NULL::text AS member, NULL::text AS product, NULL::text AS source;` } }];
}
return [{
  json: {
    sql: `WITH params AS (
  SELECT
    ${sqlLiteral(member)}::text AS member_name,
    ${sqlLiteral(product)}::text AS product_name,
    ${sqlLiteral(venueId)}::text AS venue_id,
    ${sqlLiteral(btn)}::text AS btn,
    ${sqlLiteral(requestSource)}::text AS request_source
), candidate AS (
  SELECT
    trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name")) AS member_name,
    m."Membership" AS product_name,
    coalesce(nullif(trim(bc.payer_name), ''), trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name"))) AS payer_name,
    nullif(trim(m."First name"), '') AS first_name,
    nullif(trim(m."Last name"), '') AS last_name,
    CASE
      WHEN nullif(trim(coalesce(m."Age"::text, '')), '') IS NULL THEN NULL
      ELSE regexp_replace(m."Age"::text, '[^0-9-]+', '', 'g')::int
    END AS age,
    coalesce(nullif(trim(bc.email_address), ''), nullif(trim(m."Email address"), '')) AS email_address,
    bc.address_1,
    bc.address_2,
    bc.address_3,
    bc.town,
    bc.postcode,
    coalesce(
      to_timestamp(nullif(m."Date joined venue", ''), 'DD/MM/YYYY'),
      to_timestamp(nullif(m."Start Date", ''), 'DD/MM/YYYY'),
      now()
    ) AS signup_date,
    CASE
      WHEN nullif(regexp_replace(coalesce(m."Cost"::text, ''), '[^0-9.-]+', '', 'g'), '') IS NULL THEN NULL
      ELSE regexp_replace(m."Cost"::text, '[^0-9.-]+', '', 'g')::numeric
    END AS cost,
    coalesce(nullif(trim(m."Status"), ''), 'Active') AS clubspark_status,
    row_number() OVER (
      ORDER BY
        CASE
          WHEN p.venue_id <> '' AND nullif(trim(m."Venue ID"), '') = p.venue_id THEN 0
          WHEN p.btn <> '' AND nullif(trim(m."British Tennis Number"), '') = p.btn THEN 1
          WHEN lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name"))) = lower(p.member_name) THEN 2
          ELSE 9
        END,
        trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name"))
    ) AS match_rank
  FROM params p
  JOIN public.raw_members m
    ON m."Membership" = p.product_name
   AND coalesce(m.is_current, true) = true
   AND (
     (p.venue_id <> '' AND nullif(trim(m."Venue ID"), '') = p.venue_id)
     OR (p.btn <> '' AND nullif(trim(m."British Tennis Number"), '') = p.btn)
     OR (p.member_name <> '' AND lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name"))) = lower(p.member_name))
   )
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT
      trim(concat_ws(' ', rc."First name", rc."Last name")) AS payer_name,
      nullif(trim(rc."Email address"), '') AS email_address,
      nullif(trim(rc."Address 1"), '') AS address_1,
      nullif(trim(rc."Address 2"), '') AS address_2,
      nullif(trim(rc."Address 3"), '') AS address_3,
      nullif(trim(rc.town), '') AS town,
      nullif(trim(rc.postcode), '') AS postcode
    FROM public.raw_contacts rc
    WHERE coalesce(rc.is_current, true) = true
      AND (
        lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', rc."First name", rc."Last name"))) = lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name")))
       OR (
         nullif(trim(m."Email address"), '') IS NOT NULL
         AND lower(trim(rc."Email address")) = lower(trim(m."Email address"))
       )
       OR (
         m."Membership" ILIKE '%Family%'
         AND lower(trim(rc."Last name")) = lower(trim(m."Last name"))
       )
      )
    ORDER BY
      CASE
        WHEN m."Membership" ILIKE '%Family%'
         AND coalesce(nullif(trim(rc."Member status"), ''), '') = 'Active Member'
         AND coalesce(nullif(trim(rc.junior), ''), 'No') = 'No'
         AND nullif(trim(rc."Address 1"), '') IS NOT NULL
         AND nullif(trim(rc.postcode), '') IS NOT NULL THEN 0
        WHEN m."Membership" ILIKE '%Family%'
         AND coalesce(nullif(trim(rc."Member status"), ''), '') = 'Active Member'
         AND nullif(trim(rc."Address 1"), '') IS NOT NULL
         AND nullif(trim(rc.postcode), '') IS NOT NULL THEN 1
        WHEN m."Membership" ILIKE '%Family%'
         AND nullif(trim(rc."Address 1"), '') IS NOT NULL
         AND nullif(trim(rc.postcode), '') IS NOT NULL THEN 2
        WHEN lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', rc."First name", rc."Last name"))) = lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name")))
         AND m."Membership" NOT ILIKE '%Family%' THEN 0
        WHEN lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', rc."First name", rc."Last name"))) = lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name"))) THEN 3
        WHEN nullif(trim(rc."Email address"), '') IS NOT NULL THEN 4
        ELSE 5
      END,
      CASE WHEN nullif(trim(rc."Address 1"), '') IS NOT NULL AND nullif(trim(rc.postcode), '') IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
      CASE WHEN nullif(trim(rc."Email address"), '') IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
      trim(coalesce(rc."Address 1", '')),
      trim(coalesce(rc.postcode, '')),
      trim(concat_ws(' ', rc."First name", rc."Last name"))
    LIMIT 1
  ) bc ON TRUE
), selected_candidate AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM candidate
  WHERE match_rank = 1
), existing_signup AS (
  SELECT ms.id, ms.source
  FROM public.member_signups ms
  JOIN selected_candidate c
    ON lower(trim(ms.member)) = lower(c.member_name)
   AND lower(trim(ms.product)) = lower(c.product_name)
  ORDER BY CASE WHEN ms.source = 'missing_signup_capture' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, ms.id DESC
  LIMIT 1
), updated_backfill AS (
  UPDATE public.member_signups ms
  SET signup_date = c.signup_date,
      payer = c.payer_name,
      cost = c.cost,
      quantity = 1,
      method = 'Backfilled from source-of-truth',
      status = 'New',
      clubspark_status = c.clubspark_status,
      batch_id = NULL,
      "First name" = c.first_name,
      "Last name" = c.last_name,
      "Age" = c.age,
      email_address = c.email_address,
      address_1 = c.address_1,
      address_2 = c.address_2,
      address_3 = c.address_3,
      town = c.town,
      postcode = c.postcode,
      source = 'missing_signup_capture'
  FROM selected_candidate c
  WHERE ms.id IN (SELECT id FROM existing_signup WHERE source = 'missing_signup_capture')
  RETURNING ms.id, c.member_name, c.product_name
), inserted_signup AS (
  INSERT INTO public.member_signups (
    signup_date,
    member,
    product,
    payer,
    cost,
    quantity,
    method,
    status,
    clubspark_status,
    batch_id,
    "First name",
    "Last name",
    "Age",
    email_address,
    address_1,
    address_2,
    address_3,
    town,
    postcode,
    source
  )
  SELECT
    c.signup_date,
    c.member_name,
    c.product_name,
    c.payer_name,
    c.cost,
    1,
    'Backfilled from source-of-truth',
    'New',
    c.clubspark_status,
    NULL,
    c.first_name,
    c.last_name,
    c.age,
    c.email_address,
    c.address_1,
    c.address_2,
    c.address_3,
    c.town,
    c.postcode,
    'missing_signup_capture'
  FROM selected_candidate c
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM existing_signup)
  RETURNING id, member, product
), outcome AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM selected_candidate) THEN 'not_found'
      WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM inserted_signup) THEN 'inserted'
      WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM updated_backfill) THEN 'updated'
      ELSE 'already_exists'
    END AS action,
    CASE
      WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM selected_candidate) THEN 404
      ELSE 200
    END AS response_code,
    CASE
      WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM selected_candidate) THEN 'Matching member row was not found in raw_members'
      WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM inserted_signup) THEN 'Created missing signup capture row'
      WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM updated_backfill) THEN 'Refreshed existing missing-signup backfill row'
      ELSE 'Signup capture already exists for this member and package'
    END AS message,
    coalesce((SELECT id FROM inserted_signup LIMIT 1), (SELECT id FROM updated_backfill LIMIT 1), (SELECT id FROM existing_signup LIMIT 1)) AS signup_id,
    (SELECT member_name FROM selected_candidate LIMIT 1) AS member,
    (SELECT product_name FROM selected_candidate LIMIT 1) AS product,
    CASE
      WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM inserted_signup) OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM updated_backfill) THEN 'missing_signup_capture'
      ELSE (SELECT source FROM existing_signup LIMIT 1)
    END AS source
)
SELECT * FROM outcome;`
  }
}];

const created = $('Create Missing Signup Row').first()?.json ?? {};
return [{ json: { message: created.message, action: created.action, signup_id: created.signup_id ?? null, member: created.member ?? null, product: created.product ?? null, source: created.source ?? null, batch_message: null, batch_id: null, signup_count: null, response_code: created.response_code ?? 200 } }];

const sqlLiteral = (value) => {
  if (value === null || value === undefined || value === '') return 'NULL';
  return "'" + String(value).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'";
};
const request = $input.first()?.json ?? {};
const member = request.member ?? '';
const product = request.product ?? '';
const venueId = request.venue_id ?? '';
const btn = request.btn ?? '';
const requestSource = request.request_source ?? 'metabase_missing_signup';
const hasIdentifier = Boolean(venueId || btn || member);
if (!product || !hasIdentifier) {
  return [{ json: { sql: `SELECT 'Missing required identifier(s). Provide product and at least one of member, venue_id, or btn.'::text AS message, 400::int AS response_code, 'bad_request'::text AS action, NULL::bigint AS signup_id, NULL::bigint AS batch_id, NULL::text AS member, NULL::text AS product, NULL::text AS source;` } }];
}
return [{
  json: {
    sql: `WITH params AS (
  SELECT
    ${sqlLiteral(member)}::text AS member_name,
    ${sqlLiteral(product)}::text AS product_name,
    ${sqlLiteral(venueId)}::text AS venue_id,
    ${sqlLiteral(btn)}::text AS btn,
    ${sqlLiteral(requestSource)}::text AS request_source
), candidate AS (
  SELECT
    trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name")) AS member_name,
    m."Membership" AS product_name,
    coalesce(nullif(trim(bc.payer_name), ''), trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name"))) AS payer_name,
    nullif(trim(m."First name"), '') AS first_name,
    nullif(trim(m."Last name"), '') AS last_name,
    CASE
      WHEN nullif(trim(coalesce(m."Age"::text, '')), '') IS NULL THEN NULL
      ELSE regexp_replace(m."Age"::text, '[^0-9-]+', '', 'g')::int
    END AS age,
    coalesce(nullif(trim(bc.email_address), ''), nullif(trim(m."Email address"), '')) AS email_address,
    bc.address_1,
    bc.address_2,
    bc.address_3,
    bc.town,
    bc.postcode,
    coalesce(
      to_timestamp(nullif(m."Date joined venue", ''), 'DD/MM/YYYY'),
      to_timestamp(nullif(m."Start Date", ''), 'DD/MM/YYYY'),
      now()
    ) AS signup_date,
    CASE
      WHEN nullif(regexp_replace(coalesce(m."Cost"::text, ''), '[^0-9.-]+', '', 'g'), '') IS NULL THEN NULL
      ELSE regexp_replace(m."Cost"::text, '[^0-9.-]+', '', 'g')::numeric
    END AS cost,
    coalesce(nullif(trim(m."Status"), ''), 'Active') AS clubspark_status,
    row_number() OVER (
      ORDER BY
        CASE
          WHEN p.venue_id <> '' AND nullif(trim(m."Venue ID"), '') = p.venue_id THEN 0
          WHEN p.btn <> '' AND nullif(trim(m."British Tennis Number"), '') = p.btn THEN 1
          WHEN lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name"))) = lower(p.member_name) THEN 2
          ELSE 9
        END,
        trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name"))
    ) AS match_rank
  FROM params p
  JOIN public.raw_members m
    ON m."Membership" = p.product_name
   AND coalesce(m.is_current, true) = true
   AND (
     (p.venue_id <> '' AND nullif(trim(m."Venue ID"), '') = p.venue_id)
     OR (p.btn <> '' AND nullif(trim(m."British Tennis Number"), '') = p.btn)
     OR (p.member_name <> '' AND lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name"))) = lower(p.member_name))
   )
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT
      trim(concat_ws(' ', rc."First name", rc."Last name")) AS payer_name,
      nullif(trim(rc."Email address"), '') AS email_address,
      nullif(trim(rc."Address 1"), '') AS address_1,
      nullif(trim(rc."Address 2"), '') AS address_2,
      nullif(trim(rc."Address 3"), '') AS address_3,
      nullif(trim(rc.town), '') AS town,
      nullif(trim(rc.postcode), '') AS postcode
    FROM public.raw_contacts rc
    WHERE coalesce(rc.is_current, true) = true
      AND (
        lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', rc."First name", rc."Last name"))) = lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name")))
       OR (
         nullif(trim(m."Email address"), '') IS NOT NULL
         AND lower(trim(rc."Email address")) = lower(trim(m."Email address"))
       )
       OR (
         m."Membership" ILIKE '%Family%'
         AND lower(trim(rc."Last name")) = lower(trim(m."Last name"))
       )
      )
    ORDER BY
      CASE
        WHEN m."Membership" ILIKE '%Family%'
         AND coalesce(nullif(trim(rc."Member status"), ''), '') = 'Active Member'
         AND coalesce(nullif(trim(rc.junior), ''), 'No') = 'No'
         AND nullif(trim(rc."Address 1"), '') IS NOT NULL
         AND nullif(trim(rc.postcode), '') IS NOT NULL THEN 0
        WHEN m."Membership" ILIKE '%Family%'
         AND coalesce(nullif(trim(rc."Member status"), ''), '') = 'Active Member'
         AND nullif(trim(rc."Address 1"), '') IS NOT NULL
         AND nullif(trim(rc.postcode), '') IS NOT NULL THEN 1
        WHEN m."Membership" ILIKE '%Family%'
         AND nullif(trim(rc."Address 1"), '') IS NOT NULL
         AND nullif(trim(rc.postcode), '') IS NOT NULL THEN 2
        WHEN lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', rc."First name", rc."Last name"))) = lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name")))
         AND m."Membership" NOT ILIKE '%Family%' THEN 0
        WHEN lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', rc."First name", rc."Last name"))) = lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name"))) THEN 3
        WHEN nullif(trim(rc."Email address"), '') IS NOT NULL THEN 4
        ELSE 5
      END,
      CASE WHEN nullif(trim(rc."Address 1"), '') IS NOT NULL AND nullif(trim(rc.postcode), '') IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
      CASE WHEN nullif(trim(rc."Email address"), '') IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
      trim(coalesce(rc."Address 1", '')),
      trim(coalesce(rc.postcode, '')),
      trim(concat_ws(' ', rc."First name", rc."Last name"))
    LIMIT 1
  ) bc ON TRUE
), selected_candidate AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM candidate
  WHERE match_rank = 1
), existing_signup AS (
  SELECT ms.id, ms.source
  FROM public.member_signups ms
  JOIN selected_candidate c
    ON lower(trim(ms.member)) = lower(c.member_name)
   AND lower(trim(ms.product)) = lower(c.product_name)
  ORDER BY CASE WHEN ms.source = 'missing_signup_capture' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, ms.id DESC
  LIMIT 1
), updated_backfill AS (
  UPDATE public.member_signups ms
  SET signup_date = c.signup_date,
      payer = c.payer_name,
      cost = c.cost,
      quantity = 1,
      method = 'Backfilled from source-of-truth',
      status = 'New',
      clubspark_status = c.clubspark_status,
      batch_id = NULL,
      "First name" = c.first_name,
      "Last name" = c.last_name,
      "Age" = c.age,
      email_address = c.email_address,
      address_1 = c.address_1,
      address_2 = c.address_2,
      address_3 = c.address_3,
      town = c.town,
      postcode = c.postcode,
      source = 'missing_signup_capture'
  FROM selected_candidate c
  WHERE ms.id IN (SELECT id FROM existing_signup WHERE source = 'missing_signup_capture')
  RETURNING ms.id, c.member_name, c.product_name
), inserted_signup AS (
  INSERT INTO public.member_signups (
    signup_date,
    member,
    product,
    payer,
    cost,
    quantity,
    method,
    status,
    clubspark_status,
    batch_id,
    "First name",
    "Last name",
    "Age",
    email_address,
    address_1,
    address_2,
    address_3,
    town,
    postcode,
    source
  )
  SELECT
    c.signup_date,
    c.member_name,
    c.product_name,
    c.payer_name,
    c.cost,
    1,
    'Backfilled from source-of-truth',
    'New',
    c.clubspark_status,
    NULL,
    c.first_name,
    c.last_name,
    c.age,
    c.email_address,
    c.address_1,
    c.address_2,
    c.address_3,
    c.town,
    c.postcode,
    'missing_signup_capture'
  FROM selected_candidate c
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM existing_signup)
  RETURNING id, member, product
), outcome AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM selected_candidate) THEN 'not_found'
      WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM inserted_signup) THEN 'inserted'
      WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM updated_backfill) THEN 'updated'
      ELSE 'already_exists'
    END AS action,
    CASE
      WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM selected_candidate) THEN 404
      ELSE 200
    END AS response_code,
    CASE
      WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM selected_candidate) THEN 'Matching member row was not found in raw_members'
      WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM inserted_signup) THEN 'Created missing signup capture row'
      WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM updated_backfill) THEN 'Refreshed existing missing-signup backfill row'
      ELSE 'Signup capture already exists for this member and package'
    END AS message,
    coalesce((SELECT id FROM inserted_signup LIMIT 1), (SELECT id FROM updated_backfill LIMIT 1), (SELECT id FROM existing_signup LIMIT 1)) AS signup_id,
    (SELECT member_name FROM selected_candidate LIMIT 1) AS member,
    (SELECT product_name FROM selected_candidate LIMIT 1) AS product,
    CASE
      WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM inserted_signup) OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM updated_backfill) THEN 'missing_signup_capture'
      ELSE (SELECT source FROM existing_signup LIMIT 1)
    END AS source
)
SELECT * FROM outcome;`
  }
}];

const created = $('Create Missing Signup Row').first()?.json ?? {};
return [{ json: { message: created.message, action: created.action, signup_id: created.signup_id ?? null, member: created.member ?? null, product: created.product ?? null, source: created.source ?? null, batch_message: null, batch_id: null, signup_count: null, response_code: created.response_code ?? 200 } }];
